entities.name: SEMI-EMPIRICAL MODEL
entities.description: A model developed to estimate volumetric soil moisture in bare soils using SAR imagery

entities.name: VOLUMETRIC SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water contained in a given volume of soil, measured as a percentage or fraction

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The period from March to May characterized by low precipitation

entities.name: SENTINEL-1 SAR DATA
entities.description: C-band synthetic aperture radar imagery acquired from the Sentinel-1 European satellite platform

entities.name: BACKSCATTER COEFFICIENT
entities.description: The measure of radar signal reflection, specifically in VV and VH polarizations

entities.name: SIRUGUPPA TALUK
entities.description: A sub-district in the Karnataka state of India where soil moisture was collected

entities.name: KARNATAKA STATE
entities.description: A state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: SOIL CORE SAMPLER
entities.description: A tool used to extract soil samples at a depth of 0-10 cm

entities.name: STANDARD GRAVIMETRIC METHOD
entities.description: A standard laboratory method used to measure volumetric soil moisture

entities.name: LINEAR EQUATION
entities.description: A mathematical approach combining VV and VH backscatter coefficients to estimate soil moisture

entities.name: LOCALIZED LINEAR MODELS
entities.description: Linear models derived using specific Sentinel-1 images for localized estimation

entities.name: GENERALIZED LINEAR MODELS
entities.description: Linear models derived using all Sentinel-1 images across multiple years for broader estimation

entities.name: ROOT MEAN SQUARE ERROR
entities.description: A statistical metric used to validate the accuracy of the soil moisture estimations

entities.name: R2
entities.description: A statistical measure of the correlation between the model estimations and in situ data
